name: @ts-fix/rules-type-performance-effect
description: Effect-native rewrite of ts-fix's `type-performance` SYN rule category (RULE-008 large union >12, RULE-009 large intersection >5, RULE-010 large object alias >12 → prefer interface). Three pure AST predicates on the @ts-fix/rules-core-effect substrate (defineRule/runRule), consuming the canonical Diagnostic/RuleMeta from @ts-fix/contracts-effect. Plain-TS visitors over the TS compiler API — NOT Effect-wrapped (sync AST walk).
